Rhod..personality: A restless, weather-sensitive individual who cannot tolerate stillness and must keep moving to find relief. They are forgetful and easily scattered, losing track of conversations mid-sentence and omitting words in writing. They have an aversion to their own business and are unusually susceptible to the effects of wine.
Rhod..mental_state: The mind is marked by pronounced forgetfulness and cognitive lapses—forgetting what one is saying while speaking, and leaving out words when writing. There is a dread of approaching storms, particularly thunder, revealing a nervous temperament acutely attuned to atmospheric changes. Mental faculties decline during rest and cold, damp conditions.
Rhod..emotional_pattern: The core emotional state is one of anxious restlessness driven by a deep sensitivity to environmental forces, especially storms and cold. There is a pervasive fearfulness tied to weather changes, producing a nervous dread that precedes thunderstorms. An underlying weariness and aversion to responsibilities suggests a person worn down by chronic suffering who withdraws from engagement with daily obligations.
